label_aria_roles_and_properties.en: ARIA roles and properties used correctly

label_name_role_value_exposed_t.en: Name, role, value exposed to assistive technology

label_status_messages_communica.en: Status messages communicated without focus change (aria-live)

metadesc_interactive_abortcontroll.en: Interactive AbortController and AbortSignal pattern explorer — fetch cancellation, timeout races, linked signals, and cleanup with live demos

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for AbortSignal patterns - AbortController, timeout, any, fetch cancellation, event cleanup, and race condition handling.

subtitle_abortcontroller_creates_a.en: AbortController creates an AbortSignal that can be used to cancel asynchronous operations. The signal is a one-way communication channel: once aborted, it stays aborted.

subtitle_creates_a_signal_that_aut.en: Creates a signal that automatically aborts after a specified duration. The reason is set to a TimeoutError DOMException.

subtitle_combines_multiple_signals.en: Combines multiple signals - aborts when ANY of them abort. Perfect for combining user cancellation with timeout.

subtitle_cancel_in_flight_fetch_re.en: Cancel in-flight fetch requests. The browser actually cancels the network request, not just ignoring the response.

subtitle_automatically_cancel_prev.en: Automatically cancel previous request when a new one starts.

subtitle_cancel_all_in_flight_requ.en: Cancel all in-flight requests with a single controller, or cancel them individually.

subtitle_use_abortsignal_to_automa.en: Use AbortSignal to automatically remove event listeners. No need to keep references to handler functions.

subtitle_register_multiple_event_t.en: Register multiple event types with a single signal. Abort once to remove all.

subtitle_the_reason_property_tells.en: The reason property tells you WHY an abort happened. It can be any value: string, Error, DOMException, or custom object.

subtitle_abortsignal_prevents_stal.en: AbortSignal prevents stale responses from overwriting fresh data. Critical for search-as-you-type and similar patterns.

placeholder_type_to_search_each_keyst.en: Type to search (each keystroke cancels previous)...

placeholder_type_to_search_with_debou.en: Type to search with debounce + abort...

title_ai_roi_calculator_is_ai_w.en: AI ROI Calculator — Is AI Worth It for Your Business?

metadesc_calculate_the_real_roi_of.en: Calculate the real ROI of using AI vs hiring humans. See break-even points, annual savings, and per-model cost comparisons.

title_animation_easing_visualiz.en: Animation Easing Visualizer — CSS cubic-bezier & Steps

metadesc_preview_css_easing_functi.en: Preview CSS easing functions visually. Interactive cubic-bezier editor. 16 presets. Compare animations side-by-side. Steps function. Copy CSS.

subtitle_preview_css_easing_functi.en: Preview CSS easing functions. Drag control points or pick presets.

title_api_mock_generator_genera.en: API Mock Generator — Generate Mock API Responses

metadesc_generate_mock_api_respons.en: Generate mock API responses for testing. JSON/XML. Status codes, headers, pagination. Realistic fake data. Copy or download.

subtitle_generate_realistic_mock_a.en: Generate realistic mock API responses for testing

title_api_rate_limit_calculator.en: API Rate Limit Calculator — Rate Limiting Strategy Tool

metadesc_calculate_api_rate_limits.en: Calculate API rate limits. Token bucket, sliding window algorithms. Implementation code in JS, Python, Go. Cost calculator. GitHub, OpenAI presets.

subtitle_calculate_and_visualize_a.en: Calculate and visualize API rate limiting strategies

metadesc_send_http_requests_from_y.en: Send HTTP requests from your browser. GET, POST, PUT, DELETE with headers, params, and body. View formatted responses. Free, no signup.

subtitle_comprehensive_reference_f.en: Comprehensive reference for WAI-ARIA roles, states, and properties

metadesc_interactive_visualizer_fo.en: Interactive visualizer for JavaScript array methods — map, filter, reduce, flatMap, groupBy, Set operations, and new ES2023/2024 methods.

metadesc_convert_text_to_ascii_art.en: Convert text to ASCII art with multiple figlet-style fonts. Standard, Banner, Small, Script, and Shadow styles. Free, no signup, no dependencies.

metadesc_calculate_aspect_ratios_r.en: Calculate aspect ratios, resize dimensions proportionally. Common presets for video, social media, print. Free.

subtitle_calculate_aspect_ratios_a.en: Calculate aspect ratios and resize dimensions proportionally.

metadesc_real_time_audio_visualize.en: Real-time audio visualizer with spectrum analyzer, waveform oscilloscope, and circular display. Microphone or file input. No install, no tracking.

jtc_your_browser_supports_bac.en: Your browser supports background downloads via Service Workers.

jtc_background_fetch_api_is_n.en: Background Fetch API is not supported

jtc_badging_api_is_not_suppor.en: Badging API is not supported in this browser

jtc_the_visual_demo_and_favic.en: The visual demo and favicon fallback still work. Try Chrome 81+ or Edge 84+ for native badge support.

metadesc_interactive_barcode_detec.en: Interactive Barcode Detection API playground. Scan QR codes, UPC, EAN, Code 128, and more using your camera or uploaded images. No server, all in-browser.

metadesc_encode_text_to_base64_or.en: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 to text. Also URL encode/decode, HTML entities, and JWT decode. Free, instant.

subtitle_encode_decode_and_transfo.en: Encode, decode, and transform text. Base64, URL, HTML, JWT.

jtc_invalid_jwt_expected_3_pa.en: Invalid JWT: expected 3 parts separated by dots

metadesc_generate_http_basic_authe.en: Generate HTTP Basic Authentication headers from a username and password. Copy the Authorization header directly.

subtitle_generate_an_http_basic_au.en: Generate an HTTP Basic Authentication header from a username and password

metadesc_interactive_battery_statu.en: Interactive Battery Status API explorer — real-time charging state, level chart, event listeners, and power-aware patterns.

metadesc_hash_and_compare_strings.en: Hash and compare strings using the BCrypt algorithm. Generate secure password hashes with configurable salt rounds.

subtitle_hash_and_compare_strings.en: Hash and compare strings using the BCrypt algorithm

metadesc_run_and_compare_javascrip.en: Run and compare JavaScript code snippets. Measure execution time, identify performance bottlenecks, and benchmark implementations side-by-side.

subtitle_compare_performance_of_ja.en: Compare performance of JavaScript code snippets

h3_common_pain_points_solved.en: Common Pain Points Solved by BFC

strong_why_is_my_text_wrapping.en: "Why is my text wrapping around the float?"
